pred_reason: SWC-101 applies due to identified arithmetic overflow in inline assembly operations (Finding 4). SWC-107 is relevant because multiple findings highlight reentrancy risks from external calls to tokens and treasury (Findings 3 and 5). Evidence: Arithmetic overflow found in swap subroutine assembly handling reserves (Task 6); Reentrancy vector possible via malicious ERC-20 token or treasury calls (Task 4); State changes not consistently verified after external calls (Task 2)
